_pairingUnconfirmed: tonPubkey holds each operator's mainnet v4/v5r1 WALLET ADDRESS (the public TON identity we have), not an ed25519 hex pubkey. op-2<->EQAng1Ia and op-1<->EQCk_GXt are OPERATOR-CONFIRMED (2026-07-16): the op-2 operator (VIZ7broTJHJj…, this box's live signer) confirmed EQAng1Ia (funded, multisig signer idx 0) is their wallet — the previous op-1/op-2 tonPubkey pairing was a mislabel from zipping two independently-ordered lists (vizPubkeys in gram.gate key_auths order; tonPubkeys in multisig signer-array order). NOTE the manifest tonPubkey order now NO LONGER matches the on-chain multisig signer index (on-chain: idx0=EQAng1Ia, idx1=EQCk_GXt, idx2=EQAj-bGk); harmless because the approve path derives idx from the signer's actual wallet vs the on-chain set (gramApprove.ts), not from this order. op-1<->VIZ66354 and op-3<->VIZ81beK/EQAj-bGk remain INFERRED (op-1 offline; op-3 not yet directly reconfirmed). vizPubkey IS READ ON THE RUNTIME PATH — SignerRegistry enforces a signer's recovered VIZ key matches its labeled operator id (mismatch => registration rejected); tonPubkey is NOT registration-checked. Supply real ed25519 tonPubkeys BEFORE relying on this manifest for a TON rotation.
